hyperedges.label: Data Hooks map to Supabase Tables
Route Definitions map to Page Components

nodes.label: Secret Admin Route Pattern
nodes.rationale: /admin intentionally returns 404; real admin at /gestion-csa-2025 to obscure admin access from bots

nodes.label: Auth Rate Limiting & Session Security
nodes.rationale: useAuth implements 5-attempt lockout for 15 min, session fingerprinting, 2-hour inactivity timeout

nodes.label: localStorage Config Cache (30 min)
nodes.rationale: SiteConfigProvider caches site_config in localStorage for 30 minutes with offline fallback to avoid repeated DB fetches

nodes.label: Base64 Image Storage Pattern
nodes.rationale: Images stored as base64 data URLs in DB rather than Supabase Storage; uploadFile() resizes to max 1200px; _bucket param is vestigial

nodes.label: robots.txt Admin Route Disallow
nodes.rationale: Both /gestion-csa-2025 and /admin are disallowed in robots.txt to prevent indexing of admin paths

nodes.label: Supabase Storage Buckets
nodes.rationale: Setup guide defines 4 public buckets (tournament-fiches, tournament-photos, post-images, gallery) though CLAUDE.md notes _bucket param is now vestigial â€” images stored as base64

nodes.label: Checkered Chess Board Pattern (Bottom of Shield)
nodes.norm_label: checkered chess board pattern (bottom of shield)
